name: Tea Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 450°F.
2. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
3. Cut in shortening until the mixture resembles small peas.
4. Add milk and stir together until the mixture comes away from the sides of the bowl.
5. Place on a floured surface and knead for a few seconds.
6. Bake until golden brown (12 minutes).
